tool_args.label: Standard Follow-Up Report: Transit Adjudication Bureau, 1st Quarter 2024

payload.title: Standard Follow-Up Report: Transit Adjudication Bureau, 1st Quarter 2024
payload.description: Quarterly report updating the Transit Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau (TAB) activities and outcomes, as reflected by several Key Indicators.
Statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties arising from civil summonses issued for violations of the Transit Rules of Conduct.

evidence_refs.source_quote: TAB is the statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties

payload.title: Vice President and General Counsel, NYC Transit Law Department General Counsel, MTA Bus Company

evidence_refs.source_quote: Vice President and General Counsel, NYC Transit Law Department General Counsel, MTA Bus Company
